SHORT NAME: TOT_BENE_DDCTBL_LBLTY_AMT 

LONG NAME: TOT_BENE_DDCTBL_LBLTY_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 

VALUES: Dollar amount with two decimal places (e.g., 98.76) 

COMMENT: This field is new, starting with the 2023 service year.
